title: NoCreativeMode
description: This is a mod that disables creative mode in the game.
body: This is a mod that disables creative mode in the game and has been open-sourced on GitHub. The mod removes creative mode from command parameters, the game mode options in the create world interface, and the game mode switcher interface. It also changes the name displayed in the select world interface to that of survival mode. When a player forcibly enters a world set to creative mode, their game mode will be changed to survival mode.
